items.claim: Magomed Gadzhiyev (Zionov/Zakov) got dropped early by Luis Caldas on the Contender Series before putting on 235 significant strikes and winning a 30-26 decision.
items.quote: fight where Zakov gets dropped early. Don't get me wrong. Like immediately he's pouring on the pressure and the volume on Caldus. But Caldus does drop him. Zakov unfased by that eventually puts on 235 significant strikes on Lucas Caldas

items.claim: Damian Pęchesky (Respecty) is not ready for the UFC level and will be swarmed by Gadzhiyev.
items.quote: I just don't think he's ready for this level just yet. He is going to be swarmed all fight long and I just don't know what he's going to be able to offer up in return.

items.claim: Dustin Jacoby is coming off three consecutive knockout victories over Vitor Petrino, Bruno Lopez, and Kennedy Nzechukwu (referred to as Julius Juice Box Walker).
items.quote: Three consecutive knockout victories over Vtor Patino Bruno Lopez and Julius Juice Box Walker.
the one thing on Jacobe, he is 38.

items.claim: Muhammad Naimov (or Sed) has secured four of his six career knockout wins via head kick.
items.quote: four of the six knockout wins for Muhammad say throughout the quarters of his career have been via headkick knockout.
